data.title: Apple cuts guidance after weaker iPhone demand in China
data.description: Apple lowered its revenue outlook and warned of softer near-term demand.
data.snippet: The company cut guidance and analysts flagged weaker sales momentum.

data.title: Microsoft beats earnings estimates and raises outlook for cloud growth
data.description: Microsoft reported quarterly earnings above expectations and raised guidance.
data.snippet: Azure growth remained strong and management raised outlook.

data.title: Fed officials signal caution as inflation data remains sticky
data.description: Macro investors reacted after officials discussed inflation and rates.
data.snippet: The central bank remains focused on inflation.

data.title: Nvidia to acquire startup in AI infrastructure deal

data.snippet: The acquisition is expected to strengthen Nvidia's data-center roadmap.

data.title: JPMorgan faces lawsuit over compliance controls
